race.comment: WANARUAH (4) did a terrific job to finish second when returning from a year off the scene in a similar race to this at Hawkesbury a fortnight ago, the first run for the Cavanough stable. Competitive against the likes of Autumn Glow and Angel Capital last season. Great chance to go one better. DUROVA (5) last appeared seven weeks ago when he recorded a seventh career win from just 13 runs in an open sprint at Muswellbrook. Tackling his biggest assignment yet but he has the talent to mix it with these. Honest three-year-old HAY STREET (12) had his chance but found a couple better when attempting the hat trick recently over 1000m at Randwick. Should cross and race handy. Genuine contender again. The flying LET'SFACETHEMUSIC (2) opened this prep with back-to-back wins before being overwhelmed late over 1200m at Eagle Farm last start. Seven top three finishes from eight tries at this trip reads well. CALL ME GORGEOUS (7) gets a nice run from gate two and should be in the finish again.
